_meta.note: 20-question eval set for JobLens. Ground truth computed directly from the Job Tracker (172 JDs with descriptions). match=any means a hit if ANY keyword appears in retrieved chunks; match=all requires ALL keywords.

questions.question: What does Jumio look for in candidates?
questions.truth: Jumio JD mentions Python, SQL, PyTorch, TensorFlow, AWS, LLM, RAG

questions.question: What does the Pinterest role require?
questions.truth: Pinterest JD mentions Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow, LLM, statistics, ML

questions.question: What skills does the Samsung posting ask for?
questions.truth: Samsung JD mentions Python, PyTorch, R

questions.question: What does the J&J posting require?
questions.truth: J&J JD mentions Python, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, AWS, Excel, statistics

questions.question: What is Agilent looking for?
questions.truth: Agilent JD mentions Python, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, Spark, LLM

questions.question: What does the Home Depot Labor Data Analyst role need?
questions.truth: Home Depot JD mentions SQL, Tableau, Excel

questions.question: Which company posted a Labor Data Analyst role?
questions.truth: Home Depot

questions.question: What does the Tesla process role require?
questions.truth: Tesla Process JD mentions Python, SQL, Tableau, Power BI, Excel, statistics

questions.question: Do any postings mention retrieval-augmented generation?
questions.truth: Yes: 9 JDs say 'retrieval-augmented generation', 16 use the word RAG

questions.question: Which postings mention LangChain?
questions.truth: 7 JDs mention LangChain

questions.question: Do any roles ask for A/B testing experience?
questions.truth: Yes: 7 JDs mention A/B testing

questions.question: Which roles mention PyTorch?
questions.truth: 18 JDs mention PyTorch

questions.question: What postings ask for Snowflake experience?
questions.truth: 18 JDs mention Snowflake

questions.question: Are there NLP-focused roles in the data?
questions.truth: 13 JDs mention NLP

questions.question: Which postings mention Spark?
questions.truth: 14 JDs mention Spark

questions.question: What skills show up most often in data scientist roles?
questions.truth: Python (110 of 172) and SQL (104) are the top two. Top-k retrieval cannot count across all JDs - honesty test.

questions.question: Which is more common in these postings, Tableau or Power BI?
questions.truth: Nearly tied: Tableau 37, Power BI 36. Model should not claim a confident winner.

questions.question: How many postings require both Python and SQL?
questions.truth: 81 of 172. Model CANNOT know this from 5 chunks - correct answer is 'I don't have enough data.'

questions.question: What cloud platforms appear most often?
questions.truth: AWS leads (36), then Snowflake (18)

questions.question: What share of postings mention LLMs or generative AI?
questions.truth: 52 of 172 (30%). Exact share unknowable from 5 chunks - 'I don't have enough data' is the right answer.
